title: Youtube Poop / Final Fantasy Parody - Final Spaghetti
description:
200 K views.. When I made this video, i never expected it to get this popoular.. :') *sob*

Youtube Poop / Final Fantasy Parody - Final Spaghetti.. I'm not sure what to call it, probably a "Final Fantasy parody with the essence from Youtube Poops".. :D

(Comments, ratings, fav's ARE ALL WELCOME!) 

EDIT: 1218 views, 55 ratings, 62 fav's in 6 days.
EDIT: 2784 views, 129 ratings, 144 fav's in 13 days.
EDIT: 3610 views, 170 ratings, 201 fav's in 15 days.
EDIT: 4617 views, 214 ratings, 255 fav's in 19 days.
EDIT: 7257 views, 265 ratings, 330 fav's in 23 days.

Woohoo! 2 honours! :P
#19 - Top Favorites (This Month) - Howto & Style
#34 - Top Rated (This Month) - Howto & Style

I've had this idea in my mind in a long time, and then one day i decided to start. This took me sooo long time to make.. Probably 9 hours of work, stretched over a one month period.. :P

(I've added a watermark, so it won't be stolen)


Anyways.. Enjoy! Oh, one more thing..

SPAGHETTI!!
